content.query:
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_diversity_measures
AS
SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
,CASE WHEN dis.description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE dis.description  END AS SubCategory
,CASE WHEN dis.description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE dis.description  END AS PinsSubCategory
,'Disability' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_disability_dim] dis
ON si.DisabilityID = dis.DisabilityID
Group BY dis.description

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
 ,CASE WHEN div.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE div.Description  END AS  SubCategory
 ,CASE WHEN div.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE div.Description  END AS  PinsSubCategory
,'Diversity' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_diversity_dim] div
ON si.DiversityID = div.DiversityID 
Group BY div.description

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
 ,CASE WHEN rel.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE  rel.Description  END AS  SubCategory
 ,CASE WHEN rel.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE  rel.Description  END AS  PinsSubCategory
,'Religion' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_religion_dim] rel
ON si.ReligionID = rel.ReligionID
Group BY rel.description

--Select * from  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_religion_dim]
--Select distinct ReligionID from [hr_secure_info_fact]

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
 ,CASE WHEN sxo.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE  sxo.Description  END AS  SubCategory
 ,CASE WHEN sxo.Description IS NULL THEN 'Not Available' ELSE  sxo.Description  END AS  PinsSubCategory
,'SXO' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_sxo_dim]  sxo
ON si.SXOID = sxo.SXOID
Group BY sxo.description

UNION

SELECT 
Count(EmployeeID) as SubCategoryCoun
 ,CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END AS SubCategory
 ,CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END AS PinsSubCategory
,'Age'  as Category

 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp
 GROUP BY 
 CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END

GO

Select * FRom mipins.vw_mipins_hr_diversity_measures
